name: BISGearCheck
tagline: Best-in-Slot gear tracking for TBC Anniversary
description: Compare your equipped gear against curated Best-in-Slot lists from six community data sources. See exactly which upgrades you need, where they drop, and track them on per-character wishlists — all without leaving the game.

features.title: Compare Tab
features.description: See your equipped gear ranked against BiS items for your spec, with source locations and one-click wishlist adds.

features.title: Six Data Sources
features.description: WowTBC.gg, BiS-Tooltip, AtlasLoot, WoWSims, ThatsMyBis, and Wowhead — cross-reference across all of them.

features.title: Tooltip Integration
features.description: BiS rankings appear on item tooltips in bags, chat links, vendors, and the auction house.

features.title: Wishlists
features.description: Multiple wishlists per character with zone filtering and auto-filter for your current dungeon or raid.

features.title: Multi-Character
features.description: Switch between your characters to compare gear across your roster.

features.title: Raid Scan
features.description: Inspect your entire raid to find missing enchants, wrong gems, and gear upgrades — then whisper issues directly to players.

features.title: Faction-Aware
features.description: Automatically filters out items not available to your faction.

screenshots.caption: Browse full BiS lists filtered by zone and data source

screenshots.alt: BISGearCheck tooltip integration showing BiS rankings
screenshots.caption: Tooltip integration shows BiS status on any item
Track the items you need with per-character wishlists

screenshots.alt: BISGearCheck Raid Scan showing issues and upgrades per character
screenshots.caption: Scan your raid for gear issues, BiS rank, and upgrade opportunities
Export scan results as CSV for spreadsheet analysis
Print a quick issue summary to chat

screenshots.alt: BISGearCheck Raid Scan whisper issues to a player
screenshots.caption: Right-click to whisper gear issues directly to a player
Granular settings for data sources, tooltips, and more
